guidePage.title: Guide
gameLibraryFeatures: Automatic scan for Steam, Epic, GOG, Origin, Ubisoft, Battle.net
Filter by name, engine, supported language, genre
Game details: engine detection, localization files, DLC
Translation recommendations based on engine and available files
neuralTranslatorFeatures: AI translation with Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, DeepL
Supports JSON, PO, RESX, CSV, XLIFF, Unity YAML, Unreal Locres
Cost and time estimation before starting
ocrTranslatorFeatures: Capture text directly from game screen
Global hotkey: Ctrl+Shift+T for quick capture
Smart cache to avoid duplicate translations
ueTranslatorFeatures: .locres file extraction from Unreal Engine 4/5 games
In-memory translation without modifying original files
unityPatcherFeatures: Modes: Capture only, Google Translate, DeepL
In-game hotkey: ALT+T for XUnity menu
telltalePatcherFeatures: Translations for Telltale games (Wolf Among Us, Walking Dead, Batman)
Specific instructions for GOG version (batch script)
Direct link to Italian translations download
multiLlmCompareFeatures: Compare translations from multiple AI providers
Side-by-side comparison: OpenAI, Gemini, Claude, DeepSeek, Mistral, DeepL
customGlossaryDetails: Categories: Names, Items, Abilities, Locations, UI, Lore
Empty term = do not translate (e.g. proper names)
translationHistoryDetails: Statistics: words, API cost, time, provider
Filter by tool, provider, game, date
Cache hit rate to optimize costs
autoDetectLanguageDetails: Character support: Latin, Asian, Cyrillic, Arabic
Integrated in OCR and Neural Translator
voiceTranslatorNewDetails: Record or upload audio for translation
multiLlmCompareNewDetails: Side-by-side: OpenAI, Gemini, Claude, DeepSeek, Mistral, DeepL, Libre
uiLanguageSelectorDetails: Coming soon: Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Chinese
Custom flag icons for each language
voiceCloneGuideFeatures: AI voice cloning with ElevenLabs and OpenAI TTS
Upload audio samples to create custom voice clones
Voice presets: narrator, hero, villain, child, robot, elderly
Adjustable stability, speed, and similarity settings
vrOverlayGuideFeatures: Automatic VR headset detection (Oculus, SteamVR, WMR)
Position presets: bottom center, top center, peripheral, wrist
Customizable style: font size, opacity, shadow
playerFeedbackGuideFeatures: Collect and manage player translation feedback
Categories: accuracy, fluency, context, terminology, style
Status tracking: pending, reviewed, applied, rejected
Export feedback as JSON or CSV
qualityBadgeGuideFeatures: Quality score 0-100 for each translated row
Content type badge: UI, Dialogue, Narrative, System, Tutorial
Real-time quality preview during batch translation
Detail results table with up to 200 rows
rtlSupportGuideFeatures: Automatic text direction detection for RTL languages
Support for Arabic, Hebrew, and other right-to-left languages
Dir attribute dynamically applied to document
ollamaGenericGuideFeatures: Use any locally installed Ollama model
Chain presets with automatic fallback between providers

disclaimer.title: Terms of Use
disclaimer.subtitle: Read before continuing
disclaimer.mainDisclaimerText: The developer is not responsible for translations, patches or modifications created with this software.
disclaimer.useAtOwnRiskText: You use this software at your own risk. Always backup before modifying game files.
disclaimer.intellectualPropertyText: Games and trademarks belong to their respective owners. GameStringer is not affiliated with any publisher.
disclaimer.translationQualityText: Automatic translations may contain errors or inaccuracies.
disclaimer.noWarrantyText: Software provided "as is", without warranties of any kind.
disclaimer.communityServerText: GameStringer connects to an external server for Community Hub features: sharing translations, downloading packs, user profiles and interaction with other users. Your profile data and shared translations are transmitted and stored on remote servers. Do not share copyrighted content or sensitive personal information.
disclaimer.dataPrivacyText: Local data (game library, translations, settings) stays on your PC. Only content you choose to share via the Community Hub is sent to the server. AI provider API keys (OpenAI, DeepL, etc.) are stored locally and are never transmitted to our servers.
disclaimer.aiServicesText: When using cloud AI providers (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, DeepL, Lingva), texts to translate are sent to the respective third-party services according to their policies. For maximum privacy, use Ollama for fully local translation.
disclaimer.summary: By continuing, you accept these terms and are responsible for your use of the software.
